heading: Step 4: Configure  contents.
body:
Update the following fields in your `main.tf` file:

| Field                   | New Value                                                        |
| ----------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| instance\_size          | "M0"                                                             |
| backing\_provider\_name | Your provider. Possible values are: "AWS", "AZURE", or "GCP".    |
| region\_name            | See Cloud Providers and Regions for all the regions you can use. |
